title: Update default API base URL to https://api.kntic.link/v1
description: The DEFAULT_API constant in both register.js and deploy.js must be updated from 'https://api.kntic.link' to 'https://api.kntic.link/v1'. This makes the default endpoints /v1/register and /v1/deploy.

features: In src/commands/register.js: change DEFAULT_API from 'https://api.kntic.link' to 'https://api.kntic.link/v1'
In src/commands/deploy.js: change DEFAULT_API from 'https://api.kntic.link' to 'https://api.kntic.link/v1'

notes: Both files define their own DEFAULT_API constant — update both. The trailing-slash strip on opts.api (replace(/\/+$/, '')) already handles any accidental trailing slash on the v1 path, so no other changes needed.
